CommunityApplications.Profile:
Apps by Jamison Fitz. Currently home to **Marquee** — a cinematic Plex now-playing display for Google Nest Hubs. Press play and it casts a designed card with the poster, title logo, ratings, and live progress; when the credits roll your Hub goes back to being a photo frame. Five hand-designed templates, four themes plus custom accents, and a drag-and-drop layout editor. Open source (MIT), self-hosted, LAN-only.
Support: https://github.com/Jamisonfitz/marquee/issues
